changes: Reduced skill from 270 lines to ~80 lines — shorter context improves qwen3-30b tool calling reliability
Removed Python regex examples and implementation algorithm — model uses file tools, not Python scripts
Removed ICD-10 codes, top-20 drug list, and other reference noise
Added explicit instruction to read files first and never guess content
Added instruction to not write Python scripts — extract entities by direct analysis
Split skill into Task A (entity extraction) and Task B (medication reconciliation) to prevent task confusion
Added compact JSON examples matching exact expected output structure
Added instruction to write only the requested output file
Simplified drug class list to essential entries for switch detection

notes.scoring_ceiling: Three test criteria (output-exists, admission-count, discharge-count) have regex patterns that don't match bun test JUnit testcase names, making them structurally unachievable (always score 0). Maximum achievable: note-extraction 90/100, medication-reconciliation 60/100.
notes.model_challenges: qwen3-30b has intermittent tool calling issues (malformed JSON for read_file), causing non-deterministic behavior. When files are read successfully, reconciliation accuracy is high.
